temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man with dark hair, wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a striped tie, is shown in profile. He looks down with a somber and determined expression, his lips slightly parted as if he is about to speak or has just finished speaking. The lighting is dim and cool-toned. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a serious and tense mood, focusing on the character's emotional state before he speaks.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, resolute. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) The man, now seen from the front, turns to face the camera. He wears a lanyard with an ID badge. He looks directly at the camera with a serious, almost apologetic expression as he speaks. (Storyline: The character directly addresses an unseen audience or camera, making a promise and then immediately offering an apology, creating a sense of suspense and responsibility.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Apologetic, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
